# PickleGo: Pickleball Tracker

> PickleGo is a mobile app for organizing pickleball matches, tracking performance stats, and connecting with players. Available on iOS with Android coming soon.

PickleGo helps pickleball players schedule singles and doubles matches, share open play invites via link, track detailed performance statistics, and manage their player network. The app supports game-by-game scoring, team randomization, customizable notifications, and a pro tier with advanced analytics.

## Key Features

- **Match Organization**: Create singles or doubles matches with customizable settings including game count, point targets, date, time, and location.
- **Open Match Invites**: Share a link to let anyone join a match. Teams auto-assign when full and all players are notified.
- **Performance Tracking**: View wins, losses, win rates, winning streaks, head-to-head records, and partner-specific doubles stats.
- **Game Scoring**: Track scores game by game with configurable points-to-win and best-of series.
- **Player Network**: Connect with players via text message, email, or shareable links.
- **Team Randomizer**: Shuffle teams between games for fair and balanced matchups.
- **Notifications**: Customizable notification types for match invites, score updates, schedule changes, and more.
- **Courts Discovery**: Find nearby pickleball courts on an interactive map and save your favorites.

## PickleGo Pro

PickleGo Pro unlocks unlimited match creation, comprehensive analytics, opponent and partner analysis, and complete match history.
